name: Q873
abstract: Mary Louise "Meryl" Streep (born June 22, 1949) is an American actress. Widely regarded by peers and critics as the greatest actress of her generation, and by many as the greatest of all time, she is recognized as one of the most versatile performers in cinema, noted for her technical precision, nuanced emotional depth, command of dialec…

about_quotes.speaker: Putter Smith
about_quotes.evidence: Meryl Streep is an actor, you know George Clooney is an actor.
about_quotes.doc_title: Putter Smith interviewed by Monk Rowe, via Zoom, February 27, 2024

about_quotes.speaker: Jim Hall
about_quotes.evidence: Meryl Streep used to live right down the block... I saw her coming down all dressed up. So I said, “Do you have 15 seconds for a compliment?”
about_quotes.doc_title: Jim Hall — Smithsonian Jazz Oral History
